concept: Synthesize a survival game where the player must maintain their position in a strict social hierarchy within an ancient civilization, with physical survival depending on ceremonial status. Resources are distributed according to social standing, requiring careful management of both material needs and reputation through participating in rituals, forming strategic alliances, and fulfilling societal expectations. Seasonal festivals provide opportunities for advancement through competitive displays of skill, while failure results in demotion and increased survival difficulty. Environmental challenges affect different social strata uniquely - floods devastate lower classes, while political intrigue threatens those in higher positions. The ultimate goal involves reaching a position where you can reform the rigid hierarchy itself, creating a more equitable system without triggering societal collapse.
